vulnerability.name: CVE-2025-8869
vulnerability.description: pip tarfile fallback extraction symlink handling

statements.impact_statement: The pip package code (/venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pip/) and pip CLI binaries (/venv/bin/pip, pip3, pip3.13) are removed during the container build stage. Only pip's .dist-info metadata directory is retained so SCA scanners can identify the package. At runtime `import pip` raises ModuleNotFoundError and no pip binary is present. The runtime base is distroless (no shell, no package manager) and the entrypoint is /venv/bin/compose-lint running as nonroot UID 65532, so the vulnerable code is both physically absent from the image and unreachable by execution path.

vulnerability.name: CVE-2026-1703
vulnerability.description: pip credential handling in index URLs

statements.impact_statement: Same mitigation as CVE-2025-8869: pip package code and CLI binaries are removed from the runtime image during the container build stage; only the .dist-info metadata directory remains so SCA scanners can identify pip. `import pip` raises ModuleNotFoundError at runtime; no pip binary exists. The distroless runtime (no shell, nonroot entrypoint /venv/bin/compose-lint) makes the code both absent and unreachable.

vulnerability.name: CVE-2026-3219
vulnerability.description: pip incorrect file installation due to improper archive handling

statements.impact_statement: Same mitigation as CVE-2025-8869 and CVE-2026-1703: the pip archive-handling code lives in /venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pip/ which is removed at container build time. Only the .dist-info metadata directory is retained for SCA scanner identification; the executable code paths exercised by this CVE are physically absent from the runtime image. The distroless runtime (no shell, nonroot entrypoint /venv/bin/compose-lint) makes pip both absent and unreachable.
